problem_text_cn: 1106 油泵将黏度$\eta=0.30\ \mathrm{Pa\cdot s}$的油通过半径$R=0.10\ \mathrm{m}$、长度$l=100\ \mathrm{m}$的水平钢管输送，体积流量$Q_V=0.05\ \mathrm{m^3/s}$。求：（1）管道两端压强差$\Delta p$；（2）油泵消耗的功率$P$。
problem_text_en: 1106 An oil pump transports oil with viscosity $\eta=0.30\ \mathrm{Pa\cdot s}$ through a horizontal steel pipe with radius $R=0.10\ \mathrm{m}$ and length $l=100\ \mathrm{m}$, with a volume flow rate $Q_V=0.05\ \mathrm{m^3/s}$. Find: (1) The pressure difference $\Delta p$ between the two ends of the pipe; (2) The power $P$ consumed by the oil pump.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】（1）应用**泊肃叶公式**$\Delta p=8\eta l Q_V/(\pi R^4)$计算压强差；（2）油泵功率等于单位时间内克服黏滞阻力做的功，即$P=\Delta p \cdot Q_V$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) Calculate the pressure difference using the **Poiseuille's formula** $\Delta p=8\eta l Q_V/(\pi R^4)$; (2) The power of the oil pump is equal to the work done against viscous resistance per unit time, i.e., $P=\Delta p \cdot Q_V$.
problem_answer: （1）管道两端压强差$\boldsymbol{\Delta p=4.0\times10^5\ \mathrm{Pa}}$；（2）油泵消耗的功率$\boldsymbol{P=2.0\times10^4\ \mathrm{W}}$（注：原文印刷为$2.0\times10^5$，按公式计算应为$2.0\times10^4$）
